cases.input: Line 3 labeler misses labels and may require unplanned downtime. Quality found cartons needing recheck. Maintenance has not verified the sensor issue.
First article after changeover is oversized. Production paused batch production and waits for Quality and Engineering.
Unknown liquid is found near the production line. The source is unclear.
Critical packaging material is late. Production is staffed and equipment is ready, but material is not available.
Explain how Production, Maintenance, Quality, EHS, PMC and Warehouse communicate when an unplanned stop is likely.
The event is closed. Create a candidate knowledge-base note from verified symptoms, cause, action and boundary.
